title.en: Factory Audit Records Refreshed For Supplier File Review
title.zh: 工厂审核记录完成更新，便于供应商资料核对

excerpt.en: The refreshed factory audit records organize production management, process control, factory basics, and follow-up records in one place.
excerpt.zh: 更新后的工厂审核记录把生产管理、过程控制、工厂基础信息和跟进记录集中整理。

body.en:
Yaoshun has refreshed its factory audit records so supplier files, process records, and follow-up items are easier to check.

When customers evaluate a factory, they look beyond whether a product can be made. They also care about management stability, process records, and long-term cooperation readiness.

Scattered explanations become structured records

The updated materials present production management, process control, and factory readiness in one place, reducing repeated information requests across separate conversations.

Different teams can read the same file

Sourcing, quality, and management teams often evaluate suppliers from different angles. A unified audit record keeps them from collecting separate explanations for the same question.

Useful for repeat orders

For customers planning repeat orders or annual cooperation, audit records offer a broader reference than a single product quotation and help judge whether the factory can keep delivering steadily.

Audit Records Should Be Easy To Check

For importers, brands, and retail channels, audit files are not display images. They help judge whether a supplier can support long-term cooperation. Production management, staffing, process records, and corrective follow-up should be clear.

Keep These Details Easy To Check

Check pointReviewPractical use
Factory basicsBusiness status, capacity, production area, management teamShows whether the supplier can support stable orders
Process controlMaterials, production, inspection, packing, storageShows whether order execution can be traced
Corrective follow-upAudit comments, improvement records, review statusShows whether the factory keeps improving

Keep Factory Files Connected To Real Orders

When factory audit records are needed, confirm the order type, product series, requested file list, and latest audit date first. Yaoshun can prepare the matching supplier file instead of sending unrelated certificates.

View ComplianceBrowse ProductsSend File Request
body.zh:
尧顺已完成工厂审核记录更新，让供应商资料、过程记录和跟进事项更容易核对。

客户评估工厂时，关心的不只是能不能做产品，也包括生产管理是否稳定、过程记录是否清晰、团队是否能长期配合。

资料从零散说明变成结构化记录

更新后的资料把生产管理、过程控制和工厂准备度集中呈现，减少客户在不同沟通中反复索取信息。

不同团队可以看同一份资料

采购、品质和管理团队通常会从不同角度评估供应商。统一的审核记录能减少不同团队围绕同一问题反复收集说明。

服务复购订单

对计划复购或年度合作的客户来说，审核记录能提供比单个产品报价更完整的参考，帮助他们判断工厂能否持续稳定交付。

工厂审核记录要容易核对

对进口商、品牌方和零售渠道来说，审核资料不是摆在页面上的荣誉图片，而是判断供应商能否长期配合的依据。生产管理、人员配置、过程记录和整改跟进，都应能被清楚说明。

把这些细节整理清楚

核对项建议查看实际用途
工厂基础营业、产能、生产区域、管理人员判断供应商是否具备稳定承接能力
过程控制原料、生产、检验、包装、仓储判断订单执行是否有记录可查
整改跟进审核意见、改善记录、复核状态判断工厂是否能持续改进

让工厂资料和真实订单对得上

需要工厂审核记录时，建议先确认订单类型、产品系列、所需文件清单和最新审核日期。尧顺可按实际项目整理对应供应商资料，避免把无关证书混在一起提交。

查看资质合规浏览产品提交文件需求
